# Byte Span Overlap Threshold Violations by Name Prefix

| Group | Overlaps | Max overlaps | Total overlap bytes | Max overlap bytes | Violations |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | --- |
| left.value ↔ right.value | 1 | 0 | 4 | 3 | overlap count, total overlap bytes |
| left.value ↔ scratch | 1 | 0 | 2 | 3 | overlap count |
| right.value ↔ scratch | 1 | 0 | 4 | 3 | overlap count, total overlap bytes |
